model.name: deadLetterChannel
model.title: Dead Letter Channel
model.description: Error handler with dead letter queue.
model.label: configuration,error

deadLetterUri.description: The endpoint URI where failed exchanges are sent after all redelivery attempts have been exhausted (the dead letter queue).

deadLetterHandleNewException.label: advanced
deadLetterHandleNewException.description: Whether the dead letter channel should handle (and ignore) any new exception thrown while sending the exchange to the dead letter endpoint. Set to false to propagate the new exception back, which is useful with transactions so the transaction can detect the failure and rollback.

useOriginalMessage.description: If enabled, uses the original input message (body and headers) when the exchange is moved to the dead letter queue after all redelivery attempts have been exhausted. Cannot be used together with useOriginalBody.

useOriginalBody.description: If enabled, uses the original input message body (but not headers) when the exchange is moved to the dead letter queue after all redelivery attempts have been exhausted. This allows enriching the message with custom headers while keeping the original body. Cannot be used together with useOriginalMessage.

redeliveryPolicyRef.label: advanced
redeliveryPolicyRef.description: Sets a reference to a redelivery policy to lookup in the registry to be used.

loggerRef.label: advanced
loggerRef.description: Sets a reference to a logger to use for logging error handler activity.

level.label: advanced
level.description: The logging level to use when logging caught exceptions.

logName.label: advanced
logName.description: Name of the logger to use by the error handler.

onRedeliveryRef.label: advanced
onRedeliveryRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor that is invoked before each redelivery attempt. Can be used to change the exchange before it is redelivered.

onExceptionOccurredRef.label: advanced
onExceptionOccurredRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor that is invoked just after an exception occurred. Can be used to perform custom logging. Any exception thrown from this processor is ignored.

onPrepareFailureRef.label: advanced
onPrepareFailureRef.description: Sets a reference to a processor to prepare the exchange before handled by the failure processor or dead letter channel. This allows for example to enrich the message before sending to a dead letter queue.

retryWhileRef.label: advanced
retryWhileRef.description: Sets a reference to a retry while predicate. Redelivery continues as long as the predicate evaluates to true.

executorServiceRef.label: advanced
executorServiceRef.description: Sets a reference to a thread pool to be used for asynchronous redelivery.
